# Foundry Account Abstraction (foundry-dao-f24)

A Solidity/Foundry project implementing ERC-4337 Account Abstraction on Ethereum and native Account Abstraction on zkSync. Provides a minimal smart contract wallet that validates owner signatures and executes arbitrary calldata through the ERC-4337 EntryPoint (Ethereum) or the zkSync bootloader (zkSync).

## Package Information

- **Package Name**: foundry-dao-f24
- **Package Type**: GitHub repository
- **Language**: Solidity ^0.8.24
- **Build Tool**: Foundry (`forge`)
- **Installation**:
  ```bash
  git clone https://github.com/therealyagami/foundry-dao-f24.git
  cd foundry-dao-f24
  forge install
  ```

## Core Imports

```solidity
// Ethereum account abstraction contract
import {MinimalAccount} from "src/ethereum/MinimalAccount.sol";

// zkSync native account abstraction contract
import {ZkMinimalAccount} from "src/zksync/ZkMinimalAccount.sol";
```

Deployment scripts:

```solidity
import {DeployMinimal} from "script/DeployMinimal.s.sol";
import {HelperConfig} from "script/HelperConfig.s.sol";
import {SendPackedUserOp} from "script/SendPackedUserOp.s.sol";
```

## Basic Usage

### Deploy and use MinimalAccount on Ethereum

```solidity
// Deploy via script
DeployMinimal deployer = new DeployMinimal();
(HelperConfig helperConfig, MinimalAccount account) = deployer.deployMinimalAccount();

// Execute a call directly as owner
account.execute(
    destAddress,    // address to call
    0,              // ETH value
    callData        // encoded function call
);
```

### Send a UserOperation via EntryPoint

```solidity
SendPackedUserOp helper = new SendPackedUserOp();
HelperConfig.NetworkConfig memory config = helperConfig.getConfig();

// Generate signed user operation
PackedUserOperation memory userOp = helper.generateSignedUserOperation(
    callData,
    config,
    address(account)
);

// Submit via EntryPoint
PackedUserOperation[] memory ops = new PackedUserOperation[](1);
ops[0] = userOp;
IEntryPoint(config.entryPoint).handleOps(ops, payable(beneficiary));
```

### Deploy and use ZkMinimalAccount on zkSync

```solidity
// Deploy (constructor sets msg.sender as owner)
ZkMinimalAccount zkAccount = new ZkMinimalAccount();

// Execute a transaction as owner (bypasses bootloader requirement)
zkAccount.executeTransactionFromOutside(transaction);
```

## Architecture

- **MinimalAccount** (Ethereum): Implements `IAccount` from ERC-4337. The EntryPoint calls `validateUserOp` to validate ECDSA signatures, then calls `execute` to run transactions. Only the EntryPoint or owner may call `execute`.
- **ZkMinimalAccount** (zkSync): Implements `IAccount` from the zkSync system contracts. The bootloader orchestrates the lifecycle: calls `validateTransaction` (which must increment the nonce), then `payForTransaction`, then `executeTransaction`.
- **HelperConfig**: Provides chain-specific configuration (EntryPoint address, USDC address, default account) for Ethereum Mainnet, Sepolia, Arbitrum Mainnet, zkSync Mainnet, and local Anvil.
- **DeployMinimal**: Foundry script to deploy `MinimalAccount` using the config from `HelperConfig`.
- **SendPackedUserOp**: Foundry script to construct and sign `PackedUserOperation` structs for submission to the EntryPoint.

## Capabilities

### MinimalAccount (Ethereum ERC-4337)

Smart contract wallet for Ethereum that validates ERC-4337 UserOperations signed by the owner.

```solidity { .api }
contract MinimalAccount is IAccount, Ownable {
    error MinimalAccount__NotFromEntryPoint();
    error MinimalAccount__NotFromEntryPointOrOwner();
    error MinimalAccount__CallFailed(bytes result);

    constructor(address entryPoint);

    function execute(address dest, uint256 value, bytes calldata functionData) external;
    function validateUserOp(
        PackedUserOperation calldata userOp,
        bytes32 userOpHash,
        uint256 missingAccountFunds
    ) external returns (uint256 validationData);
    function getEntryPoint() external view returns (address);
    receive() external payable;
}
```

[MinimalAccount](./minimal-account.md)

### ZkMinimalAccount (zkSync Native AA)

Smart contract wallet for zkSync using native account abstraction (type 113 / 0x71 transactions).

```solidity { .api }
contract ZkMinimalAccount is IAccount, Ownable {
    error ZkMinimalAccount__NotEnoughBalance();
    error ZkMinimalAccount__NotFromBootloader();
    error ZkMinimalAccount__ExecutionFailed();
    error ZkMinimalAccount__NotFromBootloaderOrOwner();
    error ZkMinimalAccount__FailedToPay();

    constructor();

    function validateTransaction(bytes32 _txHash, bytes32 _suggestedSignedHash, Transaction memory _transaction)
        external payable returns (bytes4 magic);
    function executeTransaction(bytes32 _txHash, bytes32 _suggestedSignedHash, Transaction memory _transaction)
        external payable;
    function executeTransactionFromOutside(Transaction memory _transaction) external payable;
    function payForTransaction(bytes32 _txHash, bytes32 _suggestedSignedHash, Transaction memory _transaction)
        external payable;
    function prepareForPaymaster(bytes32 _txHash, bytes32 _possibleSignedHash, Transaction memory _transaction)
        external payable;
    receive() external payable;
}
```

[ZkMinimalAccount](./zk-minimal-account.md)

### Deployment & Configuration

Foundry scripts for deployment and UserOperation generation.

```solidity { .api }
contract HelperConfig is Script {
    struct NetworkConfig {
        address entryPoint;
        address usdc;
        address account;
    }

    function getConfig() public returns (NetworkConfig memory);
    function getConfigByChainId(uint256 chainId) public returns (NetworkConfig memory);
}

contract DeployMinimal is Script {
    function deployMinimalAccount() public returns (HelperConfig, MinimalAccount);
}

contract SendPackedUserOp is Script {
    function generateSignedUserOperation(
        bytes memory callData,
        HelperConfig.NetworkConfig memory config,
        address minimalAccount
    ) public view returns (PackedUserOperation memory);
}
```

[Deployment & Configuration](./deployment.md)

## Types

```solidity { .api }
// ERC-4337 UserOperation (packed format)
struct PackedUserOperation {
    address sender;
    uint256 nonce;
    bytes initCode;
    bytes callData;
    bytes32 accountGasLimits;   // verificationGasLimit (upper 128 bits) | callGasLimit (lower 128 bits)
    uint256 preVerificationGas;
    bytes32 gasFees;            // maxPriorityFeePerGas (upper 128 bits) | maxFeePerGas (lower 128 bits)
    bytes paymasterAndData;
    bytes signature;
}

// zkSync transaction structure
struct Transaction {
    uint256 txType;
    uint256 from;
    uint256 to;
    uint256 gasLimit;
    uint256 gasPerPubdataByteLimit;
    uint256 maxFeePerGas;
    uint256 maxPriorityFeePerGas;
    uint256 paymaster;
    uint256 nonce;
    uint256 value;
    uint256[4] reserved;
    bytes data;
    bytes signature;
    bytes32[] factoryDeps;
    bytes paymasterInput;
    bytes reservedDynamic;
}
```
